hero.title: Your Global Partner in Construction, Industry & Energy
hero.subtitle: Integrated solutions from design to delivery — for a sustainable and ambitious industrial future.

projects.title: Our Achievements
projects.subtitle: Ambitious projects delivered through our expertise and commitment to excellence.

1.title: Construction Projects
1.desc: Delivery of residential and commercial buildings using sustainable materials and modern techniques.

2.title: Industrial Facilities
2.desc: Deployment of heavy industrial equipment, control systems and factory maintenance.

3.title: Renewable Energy
3.desc: Installation of solar panels, wind turbines and hybrid systems for lasting energy independence.

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.subtitle: SITECS covers a broad spectrum of industrial sectors to meet your needs in Africa and beyond.

1.title: Multi-sector Expertise
1.desc: Over 15 years covering construction, energy, industry and logistics across 8 African countries.

2.title: Qualified Team
2.desc: A multidisciplinary team of certified engineers and technicians devoted to operational excellence.

3.title: Custom Solutions
3.desc: Each project is unique. We design solutions adapted to your technical and budget constraints.

4.title: Energy Activities
4.desc: Photovoltaic solar farms, wind parks and hybrid systems for energy independence.

5.title: Rehabilitation
5.desc: Full rehabilitation of existing buildings, energy retrofitting and infrastructure modernization.
